commentaries.author: Cornelius a Lapide
commentaries.content: And thou shalt have joy and gladness. Thy son shall be to thee and to many others the cause of the greatest joy and exultation.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: This was fulfilled not only at his birth, but ever after by the Catholic Church, celebrating his nativity. (Haydock)

commentaries.author: Pontian of Rome
commentaries.content: Glory to God in the highest, and on earth peace to men of good will.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
